TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Gjorge_Ivanov, title = Gjorge_Ivanov, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gjorge_Ivanov} }

S.FORM: == Gjorge Ivanov == ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 5, Gjorge Ivanov, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1960) mrhuw Macedonia ta' misuw hya' ga Gjorge Ivanov, aring ryax tay 12 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. His second and the last presidential term ended on 12 May 2019. qnxan Maja Ivanova ga, kneril ni Gjorge Ivanov. Gjorge Ivanov sa kawas 2009, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi.

== Gjorge Ivanov == ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 5, Gjorge Ivanov, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1960) mrhuw Macedonia ta' misuw hya' ga Gjorge Ivanov, aring ryax tay 12 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. His second and the last presidential term ended on 12 May 2019. qnxan Maja Ivanova ga, kneril ni Gjorge Ivanov. Gjorge Ivanov sa kawas 2009, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi.
S.PHON: == ɣjorɣe i*ano* == rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ɣjorɣe i*ano*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw maʦ~ʨe*onia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ɣjorɣe i*ano*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ħis~ɕ s~ɕeʦ~ʨon* an* tħe las~ɕt pres~ɕi*ential term en*e* on ** maj ****. qnxan maja i*ano*a ɣa, kneril ni ɣjorɣe i*ano*. ɣjorɣe i*ano* s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi.
